'''ngodasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubberlike|rubberlike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-d-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubberlike|rubberlike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngodasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngodasithi|ngodasithi]] || [[word:ngodasiji|ngodasiji]] || [[word:ngodasishi|ngodasishi]] || [[word:ngodasiki|ngodasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngodasuthuthu|ngodasuthuthu]] || [[word:ngodasujuju|ngodasujuju]] || [[word:ngodasushushu|ngodasushushu]] || [[word:ngodasukuku|ngodasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngodasuthu|ngodasuthu]] || [[word:ngodasuju|ngodasuju]] || [[word:ngodasushu|ngodasushu]] || [[word:ngodasuku|ngodasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngodasufthuf|ngodasufthuf]] || [[word:ngodasufjuf|ngodasufjuf]] || [[word:ngodasufshuf|ngodasufshuf]] || [[word:ngodasufkuf|ngodasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngodasethe|ngodasethe]] || [[word:ngodaseje|ngodaseje]] || [[word:ngodaseshe|ngodaseshe]] || [[word:ngodaseke|ngodaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngodasothotho|ngodasothotho]] || [[word:ngodasojojo|ngodasojojo]] || [[word:ngodasoshosho|ngodasoshosho]] || [[word:ngodasokoko|ngodasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngodasotho|ngodasotho]] || [[word:ngodasojo|ngodasojo]] || [[word:ngodasosho|ngodasosho]] || [[word:ngodasoko|ngodasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngodasofthof|ngodasofthof]] || [[word:ngodasofjof|ngodasofjof]] || [[word:ngodasofshof|ngodasofshof]] || [[word:ngodasofkof|ngodasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngodasïfthïf|ngodasïfthïf]] || [[word:ngodasïfjïf|ngodasïfjïf]] || [[word:ngodasïfshïf|ngodasïfshïf]] || [[word:ngodasïfkïf|ngodasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngodasïfthïfthïf|ngodasïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:ngodasïfjïfjïf|ngodasïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:ngodasïfshïfshïf|ngodasïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:ngodasïfkïfkïf|ngodasïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngodasïfthïf|ngodasïfthïf]] || [[word:ngodasïfjïf|ngodasïfjïf]] || [[word:ngodasïfshïf|ngodasïfshïf]] || [[word:ngodasïfkïf|ngodasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngodasïfthïf|ngodasïfthïf]] || [[word:ngodasïfjïf|ngodasïfjïf]] || [[word:ngodasïfshïf|ngodasïfshïf]] || [[word:ngodasïfkïf|ngodasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngodasæthæ|ngodasæthæ]] || [[word:ngodasæjæ|ngodasæjæ]] || [[word:ngodasæshæ|ngodasæshæ]] || [[word:ngodasækæ|ngodasækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngodasathatha|ngodasathatha]] || [[word:ngodasajaja|ngodasajaja]] || [[word:ngodasashasha|ngodasashasha]] || [[word:ngodasakaka|ngodasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngodasatha|ngodasatha]] || [[word:ngodasaja|ngodasaja]] || [[word:ngodasasha|ngodasasha]] || [[word:ngodasaka|ngodasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngodasafthaf|ngodasafthaf]] || [[word:ngodasafjaf|ngodasafjaf]] || [[word:ngodasafshaf|ngodasafshaf]] || [[word:ngodasafkaf|ngodasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngodasasha|ngodasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngodashësha|ngodashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngodasrosha|ngodasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngodasmusha|ngodasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngodasyasha|ngodasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongodasnkshësha|gongodasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongodasnkrosha|gongodasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongodasnkmusha|gongodasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongodasnkyasha|gongodasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngodadasasha|ngodadasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngodadashësha|ngodadashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngodadasrosha|ngodadasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngodadasmusha|ngodadasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngodadasyasha|ngodadasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongodadasnkshësha|gongodadasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongodadasnkrosha|gongodadasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongodadasnkmusha|gongodadasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongodadasnkyasha|gongodadasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngedæsasha|ngedæsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngedæshësha|ngedæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngedæsrosha|ngedæsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngedæsmusha|ngedæsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngedæsyasha|ngedæsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongedæsnkshësha|gongedæsnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongedæsnkrosha|gongedæsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongedæsnkmusha|gongedæsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongedæsnkyasha|gongedæsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngodfasasha|ngodfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngodfashësha|ngodfashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngodfasrosha|ngodfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngodfasmusha|ngodfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngodfasyasha|ngodfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongodfasnkshësha|gongodfasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongodfasnkrosha|gongodfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongodfasnkmusha|gongodfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongodfasnkyasha|gongodfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
